analysis.test: Establishing that the acts of unauthorized exploitation of the protected elements of Bastille through Quiz Mania are materially and legally attributable to Cassiopée and/or Camille Lefèvre — art. L. 122-4 CPI: any representation or reproduction, in whole or in part, made without the consent of the author or the author's successors in title is unlawful; attribution requires identifying the natural or legal person […] who performed or directed the infringing act of exploitation.
analysis.faits: Méridian Studios exploits Bastille (Kbis Exhibit 1, trademark no. 4449595 Exhibit 2, order […] 2 dated 07/24/2018 Exhibit 7, Amazon page dated 01/20/2020 Exhibit 6 Bis). The judgment of the Tribunal Judiciaire de Paris dated 12/18/2020 (adverse Exhibit 12) finds that Camille Lefèvre became a partner of Cassiopée, which […] makes it possible to […] that Cassiopée is the source of the disclosure of the game Carto Royale 4. Quiz Mania is identified as the vehicle for the unauthorized exploitation of the protected elements of Bastille. No authorization from Méridian Studios was granted to Cassiopée or to Julien Mercier to exploit those elements through Tohu-Bohu. The bailiff's report (procès-verbal de constat) dated 10/02/2019 (Exhibit 18.6) was drawn up by Maître Thomas Berger 5 at the request of Méridian Studios, constituting prima facie material evidence of the infringing acts at issue.
analysis.faille: Absence of direct, dated evidence linking Camille Lefèvre and/or Cassiopée to the actual exploitation of Quiz Mania: no certified screenshot of the legal notices of Tohu-Bohu designating Cassiopée or Julien Mercier as publisher/developer, no Kbis extract (official corporate registration certificate) of Cassiopée showing a corporate purpose covering this digital activity, no Carto Royale 2/[…] Play developer account statement registered in the name of Cassiopée or Julien Mercier.
analysis.riposte: Produce the certified legal notices of Tohu-Bohu identifying Cassiopée or Julien Mercier as publisher/developer; build a body of converging circumstantial evidence (judgment TJ Paris 18/12/2020 regarding Julien Mercier's role at Cassiopée + bailiff's report Exhibit 18.6 + any commercial exchanges or public communications by Cassiopée/Julien Mercier concerning Tohu-Bohu); if necessary, seek a pre-trial discovery order (mesure d'instruction in futurum) (art. 145 CPC) to obtain disclosure of the developer-account registration data from the […].

autorites.title: L122-4 — Code de la propriété intellectuelle
Cass. civ. 1, 09-66.160, 2010-11-15
themes: présomption de titularité résultant des actes d'exploitation
autorites.summary: En l'absence de revendication du ou des auteurs, l'exploitation de l'oeuvre par une personne physique ou morale sous son nom fait présumer, à l'égard du tiers recherché pour contrefaçon, que cette personne est titulaire sur l'oeuvre du droit de propriété incorporelle d'auteur

autorites.title: Cass. civ. 1, 12-12.886, 2013-04-10
themes: présomption de titularité résultant des actes d'exploitation
autorites.summary: La personne […] exploite de façon paisible et non équivoque une oeuvre de l'esprit sous son nom, est présumée, à l'égard des tiers recherchés en contrefaçon et en l'absence de revendication de droits d'auteur, titulaire des droits patrimoniaux

analysis.acte_referme: Supplemental bailiff's report (procès-verbal de constat) certifying the legal notices of Tohu-Bohu on the […] (Carto Royale 2/[…] Play) identifying Cassiopée or Julien Mercier as publisher/developer, accompanied by an updated Kbis extract (official corporate registration certificate) of Cassiopée and a certified screenshot of the public developer profile.
analysis.moyen_adverse: Cassiopée and/or Julien Mercier deny any connection with Quiz Mania: they contend that Tohu-Bohu is operated by a third-party entity not identified in the proceedings, that the judgment TJ Paris 18/12/2020 concerns only Carto Royale 4 and not Tohu-Bohu, and that no exhibit formally identifies them as publisher or developer of Tohu-Bohu.
analysis.these_adverse: Cassiopée and Julien Mercier contend that the bailiff's report (procès-verbal de constat) dated 10/02/2019 (Exhibit 18.6) does not at any point identify them as publishers or […] of Tohu-Bohu, and that the judgment of the Tribunal Judiciaire de Paris dated 12/18/2020 (adverse Exhibit 12) — which […] relates exclusively to Carto Royale 4 — cannot serve as proof of attribution with respect to a distinct application. They rely on the letter from Thomas Berger dated December 6, 2021 (adverse Exhibit 8) to emphasize that Méridian Studios fails to establish proof of any of the constituent elements of an act of infringement attributable to their clients, in the absence of any document connecting them to Tohu-Bohu. In the absence of a certified publisher or developer title, attribution remains an unsubstantiated allegation.

pieces_adverses.piece: Attestation or declaration by Cassiopée denying any connection with Tohu-Bohu
pieces_adverses.contre: Mere unilateral declaration bearing no certified date and unsupported by any external corroboration; insufficient to rebut a body of material circumstantial evidence

pieces_adverses.piece: Kbis extract of Cassiopée showing a corporate purpose […] (excluding digital publishing/mobile applications).
pieces_adverses.contre: The statutory corporate purpose is not determinative of actual business activity; effective operations may extend beyond the stated corporate purpose without being precluded by it

pieces_adverses.piece: Judgment TJ Paris 18/12/2020 (adverse Exhibit 12) invoked to limit the liability of Cassiopée/Julien Mercier to Carto Royale 4 only.
pieces_adverses.contre: That judgment establishes, on the contrary, Camille Lefèvre's role within Cassiopée and her authority to bind the company; it constitutes evidence favorable to attribution of liability, not a […].

pieces_attendues: Bailiff's report (procès-verbal de constat) certifying the legal notices of Tohu-Bohu on Carto Royale 2/[…] Play (publisher/developer name = Cassiopée or Julien Mercier)
Updated Kbis extract of Cassiopée covering the activity of mobile application publishing
Certified screenshots of the public developer profile of Cassiopée/Julien Mercier on the […] digital platforms
Any email or public communication by Cassiopée/Julien Mercier announcing or promoting Tohu-Bohu (e.g., Twitter account, press release)
